title: TrafficRecord
description: Structured JSON Line record output for intercepted Docker API transactions

session_id.description: Correlation UUID for the proxy session

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when transaction finished

uri.description: Full request URI path and query string

request_body.description: Bounded snippet of raw request body (up to 64KB)

status_code.description: HTTP status code returned to client

response_body.description: Bounded snippet of raw response body (up to 64KB)

matched_rule_id.description: ID of the rule that determined the outcome, or 'default'
